import hero1x from './img/hero/hero@1x.webp'; import hero2x from './img/hero/hero@2x.webp'; const preload = document.createElement('link'); preload.rel = 'preload'; preload.as = 'image'; preload.href = hero1x; preload.setAttribute('imagesrcset', `${hero1x} 1x, ${hero2x} 2x`); preload.setAttribute('fetchpriority', 'high'); document.head.appendChild(preload);
